message:
audit: batch 385 final — rfc6330(743L) forward(298L) quic-transport frame.rs recovery.rs

Deep re-audits and diff audits for 5 additional files, all SOUND:
- raptorq/rfc6330.rs: overflow-safe prime, PI walk termination
- stream/forward.rs: spin loop replaced with async send
- net/quic_native/transport.rs: idempotent draining
- net/websocket/frame.rs: close validation + codec poisoning
- error/recovery.rs: CAS-based circuit breaker reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
